note: Canonical metrics live in benchmark_data.py (single source of truth). Custom CNN latency re-measured 2026-04-11 with 100 trials (1.38 ms median). All three deployed models (Custom CNN, MobileNetV2, ResNet-18) have accuracy verified empirically from checkpoints hosted on mrpouyaalavi/cifar10-models on the HF Hub. EfficientNet-B0 and ViT-Small are from the original notebook study and are not deployed.

ResNet-18.note: Checkpoint hosted on HF Hub and downloaded at runtime by app.py. Accuracy 82.10% verified on the full 10 000-image test set. Run scripts/measure_model.py --model resnet18 to reproduce.

EfficientNet-B0.note: Reported from the original notebook study; checkpoint not committed due to size.

ViT-Small.note: Reported from the original notebook study; checkpoint not committed due to size.
